DATE 8 The patient's birthdate.
18 _8 SEX_CD1 (8) Sex Code CHAR 1 The patient's sex. 1 = Male, 2 = Female
19 _9A ETH_AMRCN_INDN_AK_NTV_SW (9A) Race: American Indian/Alaskan Native CHAR 1 The patient's race or ethnic category: American Indian or Alaskan Native. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
20 _9B ETH_ASN_SW (9B) Race: Asian CHAR 1 The patient's race or ethnic category: Asian. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
21 _9C ETH_AFRCN_AMRCN_SW (9C) Race: Black or African American CHAR 1 The patient's race or ethnic category: Black or
